recommendations.title: Jeanne du Barry
recommendations.overview: The life of Jeanne Bécu, who was born as the illegitimate daughter of an impoverished seamstress in 1743 and went on to rise through the Court of Louis XV to become his last official mistress.

recommendations.title: My King
recommendations.overview: Tony is admitted to a rehabilitation center after a serious ski accident. Dependent on the medical staff and pain relievers, she takes time to look back on a turbulent relationship that she experienced with Georgio.

recommendations.title: Polisse

recommendations.title: DNA
recommendations.overview: A woman has a close bond with her beloved Algeriann grandfather, who protected her from a toxic home life as a child; his death triggers a deep identity crisis as tensions between her extended family members escalate, revealing new depths of resentme

recommendations.title: The Father
recommendations.overview: A man refuses all assistance from his daughter as he ages and, as he tries to make sense of his changing circumstances, he begins to doubt his loved ones, his own mind and even the fabric of his reality.

recommendations.title: BPM (Beats per Minute)

recommendations.title: How to Rob a Bank
recommendations.overview: Caught in the middle of a bank robbery, a slacker and a bank employee become the ones who arbitrate the intense situation.

recommendations.title: All About Me
recommendations.overview: Dramatised origin story of one of Germany's most beloved contemporary comedians, Hape Kerkeling.

recommendations.title: Boris: The Film
recommendations.overview: A director and his crew attempt to make the transition from the small to the big screen.
recommendations.director: Luca Vendruscolo, Giacomo Ciarrapico, Mattia Torre
